ground_truth.title: Best DJ Headphones for Beginners [2022] | Cueup Blog
ground_truth.author: Cueup DJ Booking
ground_truth.main_content:
Are you looking for the best DJ headphones for beginners? Look no further, because we have got you covered! In this blog post, we will be discussing the top DJ headphones for beginners, so you can find the perfect pair for your needs.

The article reviews 29 DJ headphones with detailed specifications including price, wireless option, fit (on-ear or over-ear), and ratings:

1. Sennheiser HD-25 - $122, on-ear, 96% rating
2. Pioneer HDJ-X5 - $99, over-ear, 96% rating
3. Sony MDR7506 - $99, over-ear, 96% rating
4. Denon DJ HP1100 - $113, over-ear, 94% rating
5. Pioneer HDJ-CUE1 - $69, on-ear, 94% rating
6. Audio-Technica ATH-M20 X - $45, over-ear, 92% rating
7. Audio-Technica ATH-M40 X - $83, over-ear, 92% rating
8. Audio-Technica ATH-M50 X - $115, over-ear, 92% rating
9. Beyerdynamic DT-252 - $132, over-ear, 90% rating
10. Behringer HC 200 - $13, over-ear, 90% rating
11. Audio-Technica ATH-PRO5 X - $83, over-ear, 90% rating
12. Fun Generation HP 5 - $17, on-ear, 90% rating
13. Sennheiser HD-280 Pro - $94, over-ear, 90% rating
14. Yamaha HPH-MT7 - $149, over-ear, 90% rating
15. SOL REPUBLIC Tracks - $99, on-ear, 90% rating
16. OneOdio A71 - $32, over-ear, 90% rating
17. Fun Generation HP-7 - $20, on-ear, 88% rating
18. AKG K-182 - $83, over-ear, 88% rating
19. Hercules HDP DJ45 - $26, over-ear, 86% rating
20. Sennheiser HD-25 Light New Version - $94, on-ear, 86% rating
21. Numark HF125 - $15, on-ear, 86% rating
22. Roland RH-200 - $83, over-ear, 80% rating
23. Hercules HDP DJ60 - $37, over-ear, 80% rating
24. Numark HF175 - $37, over-ear, 80% rating
25. Behringer BDJ 1000 - $18, over-ear, 80% rating
26. Behringer HPX2000 - $17, on-ear, 76% rating
27. Behringer HPX6000 - $37, over-ear, 74% rating
28. Behringer HPX4000 - $16, on-ear, 74% rating
29. Tascam TH-06 - $55, over-ear, 54% rating
